headline: Friday snacking ends today—your deficit depends on it
summary: You're gaining when you should lose; today's choices—no snacking, hard movement—determine if you catch up to your 0.59 kg/week target.
details: Today, commit to no emotional snacking—use Huel meals as your anchor instead of food as a crutch. Hit the rowing machine hard for 50 minutes to create a meaningful caloric deficit. Friday is your breakthrough day, not your breakdown: one day of discipline compounds across the 396 remaining days to your 88 kg goal.
